fields.name: Mark parent as done if all children are done
fields.description: When a work item is marked as done (completed state group), checks all siblings. If every sibling is also completed, automatically updates the parent work item to a completed state.

fields.name: Create linked work item in another project on state change
fields.description: When a work item in the source project moves to a specified state, creates a copy in the destination project and adds a relates_to relation between them.

variables.description: Project ID to watch for state changes
State name that triggers the copy (e.g. Ready for QA)
Project ID where the new work item is created

fields.name: Create Work Item
fields.description: Create a new work item in the target project

fields.name: Update Work Item State
fields.description: Updates the status for a given work item

fields.name: Add Comment to a Work Item
fields.description: Adds a comment to a work item
